capability_declaration.evidence: SunSpec Model Registry XML & Implementation Guides define static register maps for device capabilities
capability_declaration.rationale: Provides machine-readable catalogs of DER functions but lacks dynamic runtime negotiation protocols for autonomous agents to discover capabilities ad-hoc.

bounded_authority.evidence: SunSpec Model Registry defines operational setpoint ceilings; no explicit AI authorization scopes or expiry clauses
bounded_authority.rationale: Operational bounds are implied by register value constraints to ensure grid safety. However, the standard omits explicit agent permission scopes, token expiration, and revocation mechanisms.

decision_auditability.rationale: Protocol focuses strictly on real-time telemetry exchange without prescribing decision logging, attribution of autonomous actions, or audit trail requirements for agent operations.

data_governance.rationale: Purely a technical interoperability specification defining data models; contains zero clauses regarding data ownership, user consent, retention policies, or privacy frameworks.
